name: QA 1555
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1555

exercise PM_CTXFLAG_METADATA_ONLY and PM_CTXFLAG_LAST_VOLUME

flags to pmNewContext()



valgrind variant, see qa/1553 for the non-valgrind variant
